name: copilot-telegram-bridge-ext
description: Drive the VS Code Copilot chat from Telegram.

commands.title: Copilot TG Bridge: Toggle phone connection for this window
Copilot TG Bridge: Test Inject Prompt into Chat

copilotTgBridge.port.description: Local HTTP port the bridge listens on (127.0.0.1 only).

copilotTgBridge.token.description: Shared secret; the Telegram bot must send the same token. Empty = no auth (localhost only).

copilotTgBridge.notifyUrl.description: Where the agent's notify_telegram messages are POSTed (the Python bot's notify server).

languageModelTools.name: notify_telegram
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Send a short status update or a question to the user's Telegram (their phone). Use it to report progress, ask a yes/no or A-or-B decision, or say the task is done. Keep it to 1-3 sentences, no code blocks.

message.description: The short message to send to the user's phone.
